keyFeatures.en: Convert PDF files to various formats
keyFeatures.zh: 将PDF文件转换为多种格式

keyFeatures.en: Upload and convert files directly from the web
keyFeatures.zh: 直接从网页上传和转换文件

description.en: Convert up to 5 PDFs per month with no file size limit.
description.zh: 每月最多转换5个PDF文件，无文件大小限制。

weaknesses.en: Limited to 5 PDF conversions per month
No additional features beyond basic conversion
weaknesses.zh: 除了基本转换功能外没有其他功能

targetAudience.en: Individual users and small businesses with basic PDF conversion needs
targetAudience.zh: 有基本PDF转换需求的个人用户和小型企业

positioning.en: A simple and free online tool for basic PDF conversion
positioning.zh: 一个简单且免费的在线工具，用于基本的PDF转换
